title: Evangelion Classroom to Be Recreated in Hakone
display_title: Evangelion Classroom to Be Recreated in Hakone
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Classroom to Be Recreated in Hakone             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Feb 19, 2011 10:35 am http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2011-02-18/evangelion-classroom-to-be-recreated-in-hakone Some more promotional work. I just hope that they're not doing it to keep the attention focused on Evangelion even though the 3.0 won't be published any time soon...

[]:             Quote Post by TaintedHero » Sat Feb 19, 2011 12:21 pm ...as well as an augmented-reality version of the giant Evangelion Unit 01 weapon on the school grounds (via a mobile app).

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Feb 19, 2011 12:50 pm In a separate development, Evangelion character designer/manga artist Yoshiyuki Sadamoto is collaborating with the uniform retailer Conomi to offer official high-quality Evangelion school uniforms. For the World Seifuku Project, Sadamoto personally supervised the design process and create enhanced details not seen in the simplified anime designs.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Feb 19, 2011 1:47 pm TaintedHero wrote: Forget the classroom, this is what seems amazing.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat Feb 19, 2011 7:48 pm Maybe they should start making an actual Geo-Front next...now that would be cool.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:04 pm What's interesting is that this classroom exhibit is being sponsored by Toyota. At the same time that Gainax is doing a promotional anime for Subaru. This is like Ford selling a "Star Trek Edition" Focus in the US.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:10 pm drinian wrote: What's interesting is that this classroom exhibit is being sponsored by Toyota. At the same time that Gainax is doing a promotional anime for Subaru. This is like Ford selling a "Star Trek Edition" Focus in the US.

[]:             Quote Post by KogareruAsuka » Mon Feb 21, 2011 2:14 pm apparently the next thing being created is a "scale" Eva unit 02 at Fujikyu highlands amusement park in BEAST mode... they got a big closed off section (i was there last week) with pics of 02 and "THE BEAST" written across it...

[]:             Quote Post by Hoshikawa-kun » Tue Feb 22, 2011 6:22 pm I suppose next they'll be recreating Ramiel's corpse so that you can look out from the classroom and see it in the process of being removed.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Wed Feb 23, 2011 1:46 pm drinian wrote: What's interesting is that this classroom exhibit is being sponsored by Toyota. At the same time that Gainax is doing a promotional anime for Subaru. This is like Ford selling a "Star Trek Edition" Focus in the US.

[]:             Quote Post by JUSTINBAILEY » Thu Feb 24, 2011 12:37 pm KogareruAsuka wrote: apparently the next thing being created is a "scale" Eva unit 02 at Fujikyu highlands amusement park in BEAST mode... they got a big closed off section (i was there last week) with pics of 02 and "THE BEAST" written across it...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Feb 24, 2011 1:46 pm JUSTINBAILEY wrote: Isn't it only going to be a bust though? Like, shoulders up?

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Feb 24, 2011 10:34 pm They should make a movie about these newfangled "Evangelion" things.

[]:             Quote Post by TaintedHero » Fri Feb 25, 2011 1:14 am Ornette wrote: That's what the image makes it seem like: http://www.evageeks.org/2011/01/life-sized-evangelion-unit-02-in-the-works/

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Fri Feb 25, 2011 3:03 am Clover wrote: They should make a movie about these newfangled "Evangelion" things.
